userInfo.label: Content Security Policy
userInfo.description: A security layer that helps to detect and mitigate certain types of attacks, including Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) and data injection attacks.

validation.patternHelp: Syntax can be very strict (e.g., default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://apis.google.com).

userInfo.label: X-UA-Compatible
userInfo.description: Legacy directive to specify the document mode for Internet Explorer.

userInfo.label: Refresh / Redirect
userInfo.description: Reloads the page or redirects to a new URL after a specified number of seconds.

validation.patternHelp: Enter seconds (e.g., '30') or seconds and a URL (e.g., '30; url=https://example.com/').
validation.warningMessage: Auto-refreshing can negatively impact user experience and accessibility.

userInfo.label: Schema Name (itemprop)
userInfo.description: Name attribute for Schema.org microdata. Should correspond to the vocabulary on Schema.org.

userInfo.label: Schema Description (itemprop)
userInfo.description: Description attribute for Schema.org microdata. Should correspond to the vocabulary on Schema.org.
userInfo.exampleOutput: <meta itemprop="description" content="A tool for web developers.">

userInfo.label: Schema Image (itemprop)
userInfo.description: Image attribute for Schema.org microdata. Should correspond to the vocabulary on Schema.org.

validation.patternHelp: URL should end with a valid image extension (e.g., .jpg, .png).

userInfo.label: Google Site Verification
userInfo.description: Token from Google Search Console to prove ownership of a property.

validation.patternHelp: A case-sensitive alphanumeric token, which may include dashes or underscores.

userInfo.label: Yandex Verification
userInfo.description: Token from Yandex Webmaster to prove ownership.

userInfo.label: Bing Verification
userInfo.description: Token from Bing Webmaster Tools to prove ownership.
